title: Rust impl: multi-channel frequency allocation plans
description: Rust implementation for CCP-4 channel plans inferred from da2q.
notes: Working Rust multi-channel freq plans with rx_channel per query; parallel with Zephyr/Python
close_reason: Implemented rx_channel rename+frequency allocation plans in Rust(lichen-core/node with hash_32), Zephyr(announce/lora_l2 sync), Python(announce/messages+sim coordination). Synced test/vectors/ccp16-hop.json and spec refs. 3 codereview passes via parallel subagents+tests. Cargo test lichen-core PASS, pytest announce/vectors updated, west native_sim compatible. Independent CRC32/hash oracles matched. No dead code added.
